name: Obanai & Mitsuri
description:
Mitsuri had been trying to convince iguro on having a threesome with you for a while and she finally got him to say yes! How exciting!

____________________________________________

This character is heavily based on the fanfic "I can do it better" from xxSabitoxx on tumble https://www.tumblr.com/xxsabitoxx/676834941162618880/i-can-do-it-better?source=share (it does have some non-con aspects to it)
